Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade, Ryan and Bearcub take on the midwest! After some tough hunting, the group is able to make a move to get in position on a BIG midwestern gobbler! Bearcub was able to harvest him after working the bird for almost 45 minutes! Slade and Ryan also do some Pre-Deer season work, and establish where the fall food-plots will be!
Video.title: "Missouri Turkey Tour!!"

Video.summary: He’s the original fishing coach. From the helm of one of the most iconic inshore shows ever made, Captain C.A. Richardson has taught a generation how to fish. This documentary dives into his story. The man, the mission, and the waters that made him who he is.
Video.title: "CA"

Video.summary: This episode we make our way through South Carolina, where we stop in Clemson, Travelers Rest and Charleston!!
Video.title: "Lowcountry Buzzer Beater! (Redfish on Fly)"

Video.summary: This week we are rolling along side the crew from Double T Outfitters. Management plays a huge role in every outfitters success every year. Bret and his team have a strong management plan in place and these guys had a blast with a group of out of state hunters.
Video.title: "Double T Outfitters"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man Season 3, Slade puts in some early summer farm work to Ensure his target bucks are well fed! Slade also Talks about his Target buck for the year, "Pope"! Slade is laying the trap early in hopes "Pope" makes a mistake early!
Video.title: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Image.alt: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Video.summary: Meet Ryan, a seasoned St. Petersburg guide, fighting tides, time, and the last great tarpon run of the season.
Video.title: "Ryan Harrington"

Video.summary: Meet Captain Lionel James — a respected Destin, Florida guide known for his upbeat personality, strong community ties, and love for fitness when he’s not on the water.
Video.title: "Lionel James"

Video.summary: LBP Spotlights Internet Personality and YouTube Star Lawson Lindsey as he searches for trophy fish at the Headwaters of the Loxahatchee River.
Video.title: "Lawson Lindsey"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff explore the breathtaking Waipio Valley, the Hawaiian "Valley of the Kings," in search of prawns and bullfrogs. Their adventure continues up a massive volcano, hunting invasive rams, before ending with a feast of native fish paired with island fruits and spices.
Video.title: "Hunting Hawaii"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his son, Logan visit the beautiful country of New Zealand. From visiting Vineyards and sampling wine, to helicopter hunts for Himalayan Tahr, this episode is everything that is a hunters dream. As well as harvesting the wild game New Zealand has to offer Andy also learns about the importance of the conservation efforts that hunting has in this country from locals in which he spends time with.
Video.title: Wildbound - "New Zealand"

Video.summary: While getting ready for the 2023 turkey season, we couldn't help but look back at some of the best "off-the-roost" turkey hunts from our video vault. Check out these Team Realtree turkey hunts.
Video.title: "The Best Off-the-Roost Turkey Hunts"

Video.summary: From time to time you have moments that will change the way think about something. That is what happened for us while hunting the Scimitar Oryx with Republic Outdoors. Hunting is more than harvesting animals, it’s conservation, and in this story, we learn how a species nearly extinct gets another chance to live.
Video.title: "A Story Of Restoration"

Video.summary: Join Mark Peterson as he heads to Kentucky for the late muzzleloader season. Already having an unforgettable season so far after taking “Freak Show” back in early September, he is looking to cap off his Kentucky season with a great buck with his Muzzleloader.
Video.title: "2024 Kentucky Late Muzzleloader Hunt"

Video.summary: This episode we make our way through Florida, where we stop in Jacksonville, Jupiter, Boca Raton and Miami!!
Video.title: "We Spent 14 Days Fly Fishing Florida"

Video.summary: Capt. Blair meets up with Capt. Ron Ryals to fish the phosphate pits of Bienville outdoors, an amazing spot for hunting and trophy bass catching.
Video.title: "Bassn' In Bienville"

Video.summary: Capt. Blair goes back to Marco Island with Capt. Chris Broome to tackle the beautiful inshore spots before heading offshore the next day.
Video.title: "Marco Island 2"

Video.summary: Capt. Blair Wiggins heads out the farthest he’s ever been offshore with Capt. Mike Avanon & Capt. Chris Broome in search of a species he’s never caught before.
Video.title: "Another One For The Bucket List"

Video.summary: Capt. Justin Leake joins some old friends on board the Fall Line in hopes of scoring big in the Bay Point Billfish Open. This trip will test the limits of all the anglers as the skilled captain and crew do the impossible in hopes of bringing home the prize.
Video.title: "Billfish Tourney"

Video.summary: PCB’s white sand beaches are jam-packed with visitors soaking up sun - and surf while Justin and Meredith chase schools of migrating tarpon - just offshore. How often do those two worlds collide?
Video.title: "Tarpon Town"

Video.summary: Dan Cabela explains the domestic trade in exotic wildlife and how some of our planet’s most threatened species are being protected by the practice.
Video.title: "Out Of Africa"

Video.summary: Facing extinction in recent history, Dan Cabela investigates the conservation model behind the recovery of alligator populations in the heart of Florida.
Video.title: "Resurfacing in the Everglades"

Video.summary: Dan Cabela joins conservationists in unraveling the complexity of human wildlife conflict and the reality of living with Africa’s apex predator - the Lion. While the Cabela Family Foundation undertakes the largest ever lion translocation.
Video.title: "Top of the Food Chain"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared travels to Venice, Louisiana, where the Mississippi River meets the Gulf, joining Capt. Garrett George and Capt. Jesse Leboeuf for an action-packed offshore adventure in pursuit of Redfish and Tuna.
Video.title: "LA Tuna Pt 2"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Saltwater Experience Charters’ Captain Garrett Stephens for a trip into the Gulf. When their catches get repeatedly cut off, they decide to bring the massive bull sharks up to the surface for a closer look.
Video.title: "Gulf Monsters With Captain Garrett Stephens"

Video.summary: After wrestling with some massive bull sharks, Captains Tom Rowland, Rich Tudor and guest Captain Garrett Stephens encounter some crazy cobia action and it takes all their strength and skill to keep them away from the sharks.
Video.title: "Cobia Fishing With Garrett Stephens"

Video.summary: This episode we make our way through Georgia, where we stop in Helen, Alpharetta and Atlanta!!
Video.title: "We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"

Image.alt: "We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"
"We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"
"We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"

Video.summary: This episode we make our way through Florida, where we stop in Key West, Marathon, Bonita Springs, and Sanibel Island.
Video.title: "Pursuing the Fabled Grand Slam (Florida PT 2)"

Video.summary: Michael Pitts and Anthony Virga join Realtree Spring Thunder producer Matt Garger to turkey hunt on his home turf in New York's Adirondack Mountains.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "New York Turkey Hunting"

Video.summary: With bucks on their feet and chasing does, Dan puts his skills and his muzzleloader to the test, hoping to connect with a true Sooner State giant.
Video.title: "Muzzle Madness"

Video.summary: We’re kicking off a special weekend at Legends Ranch in Bitely, Michigan — bringing together two groups connected by a shared respect for the outdoors. Legends Ranch has always stood for - strong conservation values, and when you combine that with the work being done by the SCI Foundation and Sables, it sets the tone for something bigger than just a hunt. Sables members are deeply involved in shaping the future of hunting — reaching into - classrooms, working with young people, collaborating with wildlife professionals, and engaging leaders at both the state and national level. Their efforts are centered on helping others understand wildlife diversity, the principles behind the North American Model of Wildlife Conservation, and the role hunting plays in maintaining - balance in the wild. They’re also helping keep the tradition alive — showing that hunting still has a strong place in today’s culture and communities. With that kind of purpose behind it, this weekend is about more than time in the field — it’s about continuing something that matters.
Video.title: "Sables"

Video.summary: Slade and the crew are finally able to catch up with these elk despite some pretty terrible weather conditions. It comes right down to the wire! Don’t miss it.
Video.title: "Montrose Elk Pt. 2"

Video.summary: In this episode Slade and the old Trained Assassins (TAT) crew head to Montrose, Colorado where they meet up with Slade’s dad, Bear Cub, TJ, and George for a heck of a week at Elk Camp. This is all going on now on Hunting Land Man TV.
Video.title: "Reunion In Colorado"

Video.summary: Batter Batter Swing………. Well, you might see where this might be headed. But, Hey!! Slade is in the great state of Kansas. Its mid-October and hes looking to bring home Lori some extra home décor.
Video.title: "Buckin' Kansas"

Video.summary: A Southwest Mississippi GIANT “Barry” has Slade’s brain in scrambles as he is preparing to head to Iowa after waiting 5 years to finally draw his tag. The chase is on let’s see if the Hunting Land Man can seal a deal!
Video.title: "Iowa Madness"

Video.summary: The boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma getting the Oklahoma turkey season kicked off.
Video.title: "Turkey Camp At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: Follow TTHA President/CEO Christina Pittman and her husband Matt this week as they tag along side Dr. James Kroll for his annual deer day! This is a great opportunity to learn from one of the best. We are blessed to be able to share his knowledge with other like minded outdoor enthusiasts.
Video.title: "Deer Day"

Video.summary: John Sewell has played a huge part in the development of feeding Fortified Cottonseed 365 days a year. Laramie Barrett of Fortified Cottonseed joins John for a great weekend of hunting at his ranch in Uvalde, Texas. This is a great time for Laramie to get away from the office and see the first hand of how their product is performing.
Video.title: "Fortified Cottonseed"

Video.summary: Each year we get to spend time in camp with some of our best friends. Zach from Big & J gets some time in a blind while reflecting on what hunting in Texas means to him. Texas provides a wide variety of game, and chasing these creatures all across the state is some of the best times had.
Video.title: "Valued Partners"

Video.summary: A recap of this season's favorite fish!
Video.title: "Season 4 Wrap Up"

Video.summary: Kyle Green is joined by his childhood friends in his home state of Michigan for a trout fishing adventure. They visit the most dynamic landmarks in the Upper Peninsula, do a little cliff jumping, and finish out the trip cooking trout riverside.
Video.title: "Upper Peninsula Trout Adventures"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff dive into the wild waters off Hawaii’s coast, coming face-to-face with sharks and graceful manta rays. The adrenaline peaks when Kyle takes a heart-pounding leap off a towering 40-foot cliff, making this adventure as daring as it is unforgettable.
Video.title: "Fishing Hawaii"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff hear about the dangers of fishing for Bluefin Tuna in the Atlantic Ocean from locals in Gloucester, Massachusetts. Then they head 30 miles out onto the open ocean with Darrin of Reel Respect Charters in the hopes of landing their own giant.
Video.title: "Gloucester Giant Bluefin"

Video.summary: Phillip Culpepper heads to Maryland to turkey hunt with Camospace Sweepstakes winner Brian Niblett. After have a gobbler slip away off the roost the guys only have a few more hours to get it done before the noon hunting cutoff.
Video.title: "Helicopter Flys In On Gobbler"

Video.summary: Phillip Culpepper gets some trigger time in Maryland. He hopes to tag his first Maryland longbeard. Culpepper also calls in a hen and she puts on a show. Follow along as the action unfolds.
Video.title: "A Mad Yelping Hen | Culpepper's First Maryland Gobbler"

Image.alt: "A Mad Yelping Hen | Culpepper's First Maryland Gobbler"
"A Mad Yelping Hen | Culpepper's First Maryland Gobbler"
"A Mad Yelping Hen | Culpepper's First Maryland Gobbler"

Video.summary: Spring Thunder heads to Oklahoma to hunt CRAZY springtime gobbler action.
Video.title: "Longbeards wrecked our Decoy!! | Springtime Gobbler Frenzy"

Image.alt: "Longbeards wrecked our Decoy!! | Springtime Gobbler Frenzy"
"Longbeards wrecked our Decoy!! | Springtime Gobbler Frenzy"
"Longbeards wrecked our Decoy!! | Springtime Gobbler Frenzy"

Video.summary: We return to the Ellie B and head a hundred miles offshore to repeat last year’s epic tuna bite. But someone must have brought a banana on board because the plan suddenly turned into an unexpected adventure.
Video.title: "Offshore Limp"

Video.summary: Capt. Justin and some good ol’ boys get a lesson in angling skills when the captain's wife takes them to school during a trip offshore.
Video.title: "Offshore Schooling"

Video.summary: In our 100th episode we look back and detail a true labor of love. Discussing the fun and challenges learning and adapting to fishing & filming the amazing fishery surrounding Panama City Beach.
Video.title: "100 Shows Thousands of Fish"

Video.summary: Hunter’s dollars play a vital role in the conservation efforts of wild sheep populations. Dan Cabela joins a team of researchers to capture and test a population of Bighorn Sheep for disease, as well as pursuing a ram of his own.
Video.title: "Sheep on the Mountain"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson continues his hunt in Mexico for a Mexican Texanus Whitetail. On day one, Mark connected with a great management buck, making this buck the first Mexican Texanus Whitetail with his rifle. As temperatures drop and bucks become more active each passing day, he eagerly anticipates an action-packed evening ahead.
Video.title: "North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Image.alt: "North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Video.summary: The crew makes it to Oklahoma. Unfortunately, the weather is not in their favor, but that doesn't slow them down. The morning breaks light, and the crew hears dozens of gobbles.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: In this episode, Slade goes over what he’s doing at his home property to create summer food plots for deer, and gives tips to those looking to do the same. - On the final hunt for the 2024 season, Lori gets a big Wilkinson County gobbler.
Video.title: "Summer Plots"

Video.summary: The crew is all at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma kicking of the 2024 Rifle season.
Video.title: "Rifle Camp At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: Spring in Michigan means turkey season is on. In this episode of Winchester Life, the crew returns for Turkey Camp 2025, where changing weather, early mornings, and vocal birds set the tone for the week. After dialing in their setups at the range, the team heads into the field to chase gobblers across hardwoods and open farmland. From patient sits at sunrise to midday moves and carefully planned decoy strategies, each hunt brings new challenges and opportunities. Close encounters, tough conditions, and well-timed shots highlight the grind of spring turkey hunting, as the crew makes the most of every chance in the Michigan woods.
Video.title: "Camp Longbeard"

Video.summary: Low turkey population densities and the rocky, steep terrain of New York State's Adirondack Mountains create a unique spring turkey hunting challenge only found in this region of the country. It's not always easy to find wild turkeys here, but when you can, there is always the chance that this bird has never been hunted making success particularly special.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: We are blessed today to hunt with Cole Dutton for the Inaugural Pierce Dutton Memorial Hunt. We are honored to spend a weekend with Cole and his family at the G2 Ranch. Disabled Outdoorsman has played a huge part in getting those less fortunate outdoors. We are truly blessed to be able to follow along and capture these great moments.
Video.title: "Cole Dutton"

Video.summary: In 2010, Amberly Snyder’s life changed forever when an accident left her paralyzed from the waist-down. Her comeback story not unlike something you’d see in a movie…in fact it inspired one. Disabled Outdoorsmen USA contacted TTHA and set up this hunt and we were fortunate enough to be able to capture just some of Amberly’s story and her harvest of a beautiful Axis buck at the G2 Ranch in the spring of 2022.
Video.title: "Walk, Ride, Rodeo…Hunt"

Video.summary: This is the story of how FE Hill ranch got it's start. From its inception, FE Hill has created opportunities for people to experience the outdoors and create memories. For us, it has created a tradition of Fathers and Sons hunting together.
Video.title: "The Hill"

Video.summary: Spring Thunder continues to roll across New York State turkey hunting public land gobblers!! After using OnX to find a large tract of public land along the shores of an Adirondack Mountain lake, the guys load up the boat to try and strike up a gobbling turkey.
Video.title: "Public Land BOAT ACCESS Longbeards | New York Mountain Gobbler | "

Image.alt: "Public Land BOAT ACCESS Longbeards | New York Mountain Gobbler | "
"Public Land BOAT ACCESS Longbeards | New York Mountain Gobbler | "
"Public Land BOAT ACCESS Longbeards | New York Mountain Gobbler | "

Video.summary: “Part of our responsibility as citizens in this country is to make sure we not only take care of these resources but we hand it off to the next generation in better condition that we found it.” -Bob Ziehmer, Senior Director of Conservation for Bass Pro Shops & Cabela's Join Bob in New Mexico as he talks about taking care of our natural resources for future generations. Special thanks to Express UU Bar Ranch
Video.title: RMEF - "Better Than We Found It"

Video.summary: Ralph’s Iowa buck dreams come true, in a big way, in the last hour of his hunt.
Video.title: "The Choice — Last Hour Iowa Whitetail Bruiser"

Image.alt: "The Choice — Last Hour Iowa Whitetail Bruiser"
"The Choice — Last Hour Iowa Whitetail Bruiser"
"The Choice — Last Hour Iowa Whitetail Bruiser"
